relationship.description: Each employee is assigned to one department; a department employs many employees
Each department has a single manager, referenced by DEPARTMENT.manager_id
Each project is owned by one department; a department can sponsor many projects
An employee can have many participation records in projects
A project can have many employee participation records

metadata.improvements_made: Added explicit manager_id foreign key in DEPARTMENT to clarify the 1:1 manager relationship; introduced participation_id surrogate key in EMPLOYEE_PROJECT to guarantee unique participation records and support a composite primary key concept; retained valuable descriptive attributes (location, budget, project dates, status) for richer reporting; kept the associative entity EMPLOYEE_PROJECT for the many‑to‑many Employee‑Project relationship; ensured all relationships are clearly described with correct cardinalities.
